ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the repository was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the repository */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the repository (public, private, internal) */,
  "default_branch" TEXT /* Name of the default branch (e.g., main, master) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the commit was made */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the commit */,
  "committed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the commit was made */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the commit */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Unique hash of the commit */,
  "commit_type" TEXT /* Type of commit (e.g., feature, bugfix, refactor) */,
  "commit_size" INTEGER /* Size of the commit in bytes */,
  "commit_url" TEXT /* URL to the commit on the repository's web interface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pullreq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "head_repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the head commit is located */,
  "base_repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the base commit is located */,
  "head_commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head commit */,
  "base_commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base commit */,
  "intra_branch" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the pull request is intra-branch (true) or inter-branch (false) */,
  "merged" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the pull request has been merged (true) or not (false) */,
  "opened_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pull request was opened */,
  "closed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pull request was closed */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the pull request */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pull request */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the pull request */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is assigned to review the pull request */,
  "merge_commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit that results from merging the pull request */,
  "merge_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who merged the pull request */,
  "merge_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pull request was merged */,
  "closed_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who closed the pull request */,
  "closed_reason" TEXT /* Reason for closing the pull request (e.g., abandoned, duplicate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pullreq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_base_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_base_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_merge_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("merge_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_head_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_closed_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("closed_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_head_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, reviewer, maintainer) */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's avatar */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pullreq_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "pullreq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last edited */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment is resolved (true) or not (false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pullreq_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pullreq_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES pullreq_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pullreq_comments_pullreq_id FOREIGN KEY ("pullreq_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pullreq_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pullreq_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "pullreq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request the review belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, changes requested) */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was performed */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Review comment (if any) */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the review is the final review (true) or not (false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pullreq_reviews_pullreq_id FOREIGN KEY ("pullreq_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pullreq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pullreq_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pullreq_branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "pullreq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request the branch belongs to */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the branch is located */,
  "branch_type" TEXT /* Type of the branch (e.g., feature, bugfix, hotfix) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the branch was created */,
  "merged_into_branch" TEXT /* Name of the branch into which this branch is merged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pullreq_branches_pullreq_id FOREIGN KEY ("pullreq_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pullreq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pullreq_branches_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pullreq_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "pullreq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., source code, documentation) */,
  "file_diff" TEXT /* Diff of the changes made in the file */,
  "changed_lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines changed in the file */,
  "is_new_file" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the file is new (true) or modified (false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pullreq_files_pullreq_id FOREIGN KEY ("pullreq_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pullreq_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pullreq_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "pullreq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request the metric belongs to */,
  "review_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to review the pull request in hours */,
  "merge_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to merge the pull request in hours */,
  "number_of_commits" INTEGER /* Number of commits in the pull request */,
  "number_of_files" INTEGER /* Number of files modified in the pull request */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews performed on the pull request */,
  "number_of_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the pull request */,
  "number_of_resolved_comments" INTEGER /* Number of resolved comments */,
  "number_of_revisions" INTEGER /* Number of revisions made to the pull request */,
  "average_review_time" INTEGER /* Average time taken for each review in hours */,
  "average_merge_time" INTEGER /* Average time taken for merging in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pullreq_metrics_pullreq_id FOREIGN KEY ("pullreq_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pullreq_id")
)
